case_number: constrained to observe that no case

chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D794of 2013: Muhammad Rafique Chandio &Others Vs. D.E.O/Ex. E.D.O (Education), District Kambar-Shahdadkot For the Petitioners: Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri, Advocate For the Respondents: Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Additional Advocate General. Dates of hearing: 22.02.2022 Date of announcement: 22.02.2022 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitioners seek issuance of offer/ appointment letters for the post of Primary School Teachers on the premise that they have succeeded in the merit list insuch regard. The comments filed by the respondents demonstrate that the score obtained by the respective petitioners was insufficient to declare them successful and the persons with higher scores were considered for appointment in accordance with law. It was demonstrated from the record that only persons with higher scores were considered for employment in the pertinent recruitment process. No vested right has been demonstrated before us to consider the relief claimed by the petitioners. In view hereof, this Court is constrained to observe that no case has been set forth for the invocation of the discretionary writ jurisdiction of this Court, hence, this petition is hereby dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Per Ijaz Ul Ahsan J. in Syed Iqbal Hussain Shah Gillani vs. PBC & Others reported as 2021 SCMR 425; Muhammad Fiaz Khan vs. Ajmer Khan & Another reported as 2010 SCMR 105.
